purpose: Produce the final human-readable audit document for the entire risk management system. This is the reference document an operator reads to understand the full risk architecture: what exists, what was verified, what gaps remain, and what the recommended next actions are. No code changes. The output is one well-structured markdown file.

in_scope: Read all prior phase outputs in BOT_BRIDGE/08_SHARED_CONTEXT/
out_of_scope: Do not change any production file
Do not reopen gaps that were already verified and closed
Do not redesign strategy or model logic
Do not recommend changes that were explicitly ruled out by manager guardrails

sections.content: One-paragraph description of the risk system as it exists after all phases are applied. Plain English. Operator-readable.
Table: file | role in risk system | phases that modified it | current state (VERIFIED/PARTIAL/UNCHANGED)
Full description of take-profit and stop-loss architecture: canonical functions, threshold values, exit reason taxonomy, cooldown table. Every number sourced from phase 1 and phase 5 verification.
Canonical sizing formula with worked example. Confidence tier table or formula. All caps. Source: phase 2 SIZING_RULES_SPEC_001.md verified in phase 5.
End-to-end trace of how current_held_price flows from Polymarket orderbook → _held_bid() → check_exit() → close_position() → DB. Confirm no raw YES/NO price leaks into this chain.
All canonical definitions with their verified computation paths. Dashboard number derivation table. Any remaining inconsistencies.
Full description of how positions close: TP/SL/gap/trailing/near_resolution/time_exit/market_resolved. Include the resolution_watcher integration. Cooldown table.
Summary table from RISK_VERIFY_REPORT_001.md: check_id | PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL | evidence. Include overall verdict.
Table: gap_id | description | severity (HIGH/MED/LOW) | status (OPEN/PARTIAL/CLOSED) | recommended action. Include gaps from all phases that were not fully closed.
Ordered list of next recommended tasks. Each item: task description, why it matters, estimated impact. Do not invent new strategy — only execution/risk/monitoring improvements.

preflight_questions: Are all prior phase spec docs available in 08_SHARED_CONTEXT/?
What is the overall verdict from RISK_VERIFY_REPORT_001.md?
acceptance_criteria: RISK_MANAGEMENT_FINAL_AUDIT_001.md is written with all 10 sections
Every number in the document is sourced to a file:line or prior phase document
Gaps table clearly distinguishes OPEN vs PARTIAL vs CLOSED
Recommended next actions are specific and bounded — not vague suggestions
Document is readable by a non-developer operator
proof_of_work: Confirm every claim in sections 3-7 is sourced to a specific file:line or prior phase doc
guardrails: Do not change any production file
Do not redesign strategy or model logic
Do not reintroduce ambiguous YES/NO economics
Do not recommend fake bankroll resets
Distinguish clearly: VERIFIED | PARTIAL | BLOCKED | SUPERSEDED
